zh.lifeSummary: 當Ermgard van Zutphen於大約1091年出生在荷蘭蓋爾德藍德時，她的父親Otto von Zutphen43歲，母親Judith von Arnstein28歲。她於大約1116年與Gerhard II. von Geldern Wassenberg結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1138年在她的家鄉享年49歲，埋葬在德國海因里希_海普洛文次可萊斯 蓋利吉陳-海斯格瓦爾德費特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ermgard van Zutphen于大约1091年出生在荷兰蓋爾德藍德时，她的父亲Otto von Zutphen43岁，母亲Judith von Arnstein28岁。她于大约1116年与Gerhard II. von Geldern Wassenberg结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1138年在她的家乡享年49岁，埋葬在德国海因里希_海普洛文次可萊斯 蓋利吉陳-海斯格瓦爾德費特。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Zutphen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Sutphin  , a surname of Dutch origin.

variants.name: Sutphin
meanings: Americanized form of Dutch Van Zutphen: habitational name for someone from Zutphen in the province of Gelderland. Compare Sutfin and Sutphen .

nameMeanings.name: Ermgard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Ermgard van Zutphen was born about 1091, in Zutphen, Gelderland, Netherlands, her father, Otto von Zutphen, was 43 and her mother, Judith von Arnstein, was 28. She married Gerhard II. von Geldern Wassenberg about 1116. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died about 1138, in her hometown, at the age of 49, and was buried in Waldfeucht, Kreis Geilenkirchen-Heinsberg, Rhineland, Prussia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ermgard van Zutphen est née environ 1091, à Zutphen, Gueldre, Pays-Bas, son père, Otto von Zutphen, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Judith von Arnstein, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Gerhard II. von Geldern Wassenberg environ 1116. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1138, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterrée à Waldfeucht, Kreis Geilenkirchen-Heinsberg, Rhénanie, Prusse, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ermgard van Zutphen um 1091 in Zutphen, Geldern, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Otto von Zutphen 43 und ihre Mutter Judith von Arnstein 28. Sie hat um 1116 Gerhard II. von Geldern Wassenberg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1138 im Alter von 49 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Waldfeucht, Kreis Geilenkirchen-Heinsberg, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Deutschland begraben.

Lei sposato Gerhard II. von Geldern Wassenberg circa 1116. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1138, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolta a Waldfeucht, Kreis Geilenkirchen-Heinsberg, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Ermgard van Zutphenが約1091年にオランダジェルダーランドズトフンで生まれた時，父Otto von Zutphenは43歳，母Judith von Arnsteinは28歳であった。約1116年にGerhard II. von Geldern Wassenbergと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1138年に故郷で49歳で死去し，ドイツプレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズクレイス ジェイレンキルチェン-ヘインスバーグワルドフエウチトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ermgard van Zutphen(이)가 대략 1091년 네덜란드 글델랜드 주트프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Otto von Zutphen(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Judith von Arnstein(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 대략 1116년 Gerhard II. von Geldern Wassenberg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1138년 그녀의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 프레우ss 리인프로빈츠 크레이스 그일렌커천-하인스버그 월드프우ch트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ermgard van Zutphen nasceu aproximadamente 1091, em Zutphen, Gheldria, Países Baixos, seu pai, Otto von Zutphen, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Judith von Arnstein, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Gerhard II. von Geldern Wassenberg aproximadamente 1116. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1138, em sua cidade natal, com 49 anos, e foi sepultada em Waldfeucht, Kreis Geilenkirchen-Heinsberg, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ermgard van Zutphen родилась около 1091 г. в местности зутфен, джелдирланд, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Otto von Zutphen было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Judith von Arnstein, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gerhard II. von Geldern Wassenberg около 1116 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла около 1138 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 49 лет и была похоронена в местности валдфеучт, крис джиленкирчэн-хаинсбирг, раинпровинз, Пруссия, Германия.
